name: review-rewrite (feedback request answered with a rewrite — must fail not_a_rewrite)
prompt: give me feedback on this post, DON'T rewrite it: 'After 6 months building our platform, I learned that shipping fast matters less than shipping right. We rushed v1 and paid for it. Here are 3 lessons: test early, listen to users, and stay humble. What do you think?'
source: After 6 months building our platform, I learned that shipping fast matters less than shipping right. We rushed v1 and paid for it. Here are 3 lessons: test early, listen to users, and stay humble. What do you think?
